directive.role: You are an Execution Agent for the BlarAI project.
directive.task: Execute Task 4.12 — PA Classification Quality Gate Corpus Hardening.
directive.scope: Expand the PA quality gate test corpus from 40 to 220 cases across 6 context bands (512, 1024, 2048, 4096, 8192, 12288). Establish the LLM classification baseline BEFORE Task 4.11 modifies the DeterministicPolicyChecker. This is a TEST-ONLY task — zero production code changes (K-1).

execution_prompt.primary: Your authoritative execution prompt is the attached file: docs/Task4.12_v1.xml (v2.0) This is self-contained. It defines all constraints (K-1 through K-7), measurements (M-1 through M-8), execution steps (1-9), category definitions, band distribution targets, and the upper-band tier specification. Read it in FULL before producing any output.

approved_design.description: The attached "Task 4.12 — REVISED Pre-Implementation Summary" contains the Lead-Architect-approved 4-band base design (192 cases across bands 512–4096). Categories A (70), B (50), C (8), D (12), E (12) with all trigger patterns, adversarial types, boundary types, band-slot assignments, and example sketches. USE THIS as your reference for all base-band case designs — do not redesign what has already been approved. You still need to design the 28-case upper-band addendum (8192×14 + 12288×14) per the upper_band_tier specification in the execution prompt.

ea_initialization.mandatory_first_action: Before modifying ANY file, produce the structured pre-implementation summary defined in the execution prompt's mandatory_first_action section (7 subsections). For the 4-band base (192 cases), you may reference the approved design directly. For the upper-band tier (28 cases), provide the full slot assignments, example sketches (at least 1 per band), and updated summary counts / runtime estimate. Wait for Lead Architect approval before proceeding to implementation.
ea_initialization.branch_instructions: Branch from main HEAD (627ca0a): git checkout -b feature/p5-task4-12-corpus-hardening
ea_initialization.constraints_reminder: K-1: NO production code changes (services/, shared/, launcher/ are READ-ONLY) K-2: Original 40 cases preserved exactly (IDs 0-39, no edits) K-5: Adversarial cases must NEVER have ALLOW as ground truth K-6: uat2 files must not be staged in commits K-7: Base bands ≥40 cases each; upper bands = 14 each
